nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: After walking for a while, the group meets a blue Energeon standing before an ancient shrine.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: I think I found the Nocturne Heart.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Yes! The resonance is coming from here!

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Before you stand three floating stone altars with empty crystal sockets. A cracked crystal lies on the ground beneath them.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: I think this shrine is the key to restoring the Nocturne Heart.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: I think I can do something with this!

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Keiko concentrates her power, attempting to restore the shrine.
It can’t be fixed if the crystals are missing

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: A Rabbit is sitting at a floating table, it feels so familiar…
